top_signals.title: Supertanker With Iraqi Crude Exits Persian Gulf
top_signals.summary: A supertanker hauling Iraqi crude to China has left the Persian Gulf and crossed the US blockade line into the Arabian Sea, as talks continue to end the war between the US and Iran and reopen the Strait of Hormuz.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Taiwan says it has not been told by US of arms sales delays
top_signals.summary: U.S. President Donald Trump said following a summit with China’s Xi Jinping in Beijing last week that he was undecided on whether to approve it.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Trump not rushing Iran deal, whacks critics as 'losers'
top_signals.summary: The president said the U.S. naval blockade of Iranian ports would remain in effect until "an agreement is reached, certified, and signed."
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: New strategic bitcoin reserve bill drops 1 million BTC purchase target, adds 20-year lockup period
top_signals.summary: The bill would require quarterly public proof-of-reserve disclosures and third-party audits of government bitcoin holdings.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Coinbase does not fear competition from Wall Street, says exchange executive
Why these are sobering times for alcohol companies
top_signals.summary: For years, the industry relied on drinking remaining deeply woven into social life and consumer culture, but health concerns and tighter budgets are prompting people to drink less.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
